mapper.select:
SELECT id, product_id as "productId", quantity, reserved_quantity as "reserved", low_stock_threshold as "lowStockThreshold", status, state_id as "stateId" FROM inventory_item
AND product_id = #{productId} AND status = #{status} AND state_id = #{stateId}

SELECT id, product_id as "productId", quantity, reserved_quantity as "reserved", low_stock_threshold as "lowStockThreshold", status, state_id as "stateId" FROM inventory_item WHERE product_id = #{productId}
